name: daroon
description: Local-first personal context and setup skills for AI agents.

interface.shortDescription: Local-first personal context and setup skills for AI agents.
interface.longDescription: Gives Codex and similar agents a durable, file-first way to set up, read, capture, and curate personal context across projects, people, topics, logs, sources, and open loops.
defaultPrompt: Curate recent context into durable notes.
